scenario: Discourse work session - audit the Upload contract before a teardown rework

steps.name: Map the Upload contract and what it is built on
Trace how an upload is created and processed
Audit every dependent of the Upload contract
Trace how upload identity and storage location are guarded
Assess the blast radius of the contract change

misses.detail: pre-MCP bypasses: 0, post-MCP verification reads: 0, post-MCP misses: 3 (diagnostic only — grep_count drives fluency)
